item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Most people say "someone else will stop and help" instead of "I'm going to stop and help"
item.description: Everything going into the bags for the homeless: Lotion and lip balm First aid kits Bottles of water and Gatorade Toothbrush and paste Shaving cream and razor Sunscreen Food/snacks Deodorant and shower wipes Hand sanitizer and female hygiene essentials Hand warmers 2 Packs of tissue 2 pairs Wool socks, 4 pairs socks, mittens, beanie Blanket Rain poncho Umbrella Narcan Pamphlets with information on shelter, food banks and recovery resources. And more! Everything was organized and put into a cinch
item.dc:creator: propagausi

item.title: Thursday unhinged meme dump of pure chaos #259
item.description:
1. Yes, Mr. Anderson... COME with us
2. An average day in the life of a plumber
3. Thanks bro
4. Winding her up
5. He thought he could just smile and wag tail and get away with it... Narrator: He did.
6. Do Mortal Kombat and backpipes mix? You be the judge
7. Twerky twerky little frog
8. I'm really curious what he did at the job interview to prove he can do this job
9. How to hold gun in Italy
10. A magnificent shark
11. This messed me up for a sec
12. Futuristic chariot
13
14. Me, when I hear there is more pizza
15. Would you eat some nihilist pancakes? P.S. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. Anyway, that's all for now. Have a great Thursday. If work sucks, refer back to this dump and Imgur
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: Morbidly yours
item.description:
owo
Michael Jackson just finds out there's a new playground.
HE THICC
He wanted to go surfing, but the sea is flat calm.
owo
Disney everyone, they'll make a fi;m nobody wants and cancel shows everyone wants/
Oh no.
I mean this how people saw medieval England in Medieval times.
Mary Shelly. Seriously go look it up.
I tried linux, went back to Windows, transitioned, then went back to Linux.
That's the plan
They have so many feelings and demand you feel the same way or die.
this is by design
and when you read that passage they call you a heritic and cite Paul, because Paul means more to them than Jesus.
yes it would be very funny.
ok now I wanna listen to that
NOOT NOOT
:o
oh no
not gonna lie, that is a good song to kill people to.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I surprised my husband with a meal for the first time since I became disabled 18 months ago.
item.description:
Martin hung out with me while I was working. He helped me pick up the things that inevitably fell off my lap. He's a professional.
I've had to learn how to carry things on my lap (still dropped everything), utilizing the oven without burning myself (I did anyways), working on my lap instead of a counter. This meal took me all day to make because of how many breaks I took. I'm so dang proud of myself.
item.dc:creator: itslikeavanthatsslowandbig

item.title: THURSDAY'S POLITICAL ROUND UP. 3 Days left this Summer...Make 'Em Count!
item.description:
Somethin's FUCKY. Wake up, MSM! Stop kissing a felonious citizen's ass.
Voting 3rd Party? Not voting? Yeah that would be voting for a rapist / traitor / racist / con man / and his pet couch nuzzler.
Gentle Reminder: RSVP TODAY.
DO YOUR PART: VOTE BLUE! Vote EVERY election, Locals, State and National. Check your credentials, your polling place, your registration at VOTE.ORG. Take another BLUE voter with you. Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted! Check your registration to make sure you haven't been purged: https://www.usa.gov/confirm-voter-registration...AND... https://www.nass.org/can-I-vote That link will take you to your state site and if you are overseas you can check there also. Make sure your friends are registered and remind them to vote. Spend an afternoon phone banking or canvassing. Or donate $5.
Never understood how ANY union member could vote against their own best interests. Never will understand, A vote for Traitor tRump is a vote to cut your own throat. #Solidarity
So far The Western teamsters, including CA, AZ and NV have endorsed Harris, so have branches in WI, MI and PA and others. The national union not endorsing may backfire even more on Trump, instead of 1 news drop now there will likely be a few a day for several days. Oh and their Black Caucus endorsed Harris a while back Eat it, Sean O'Brien. You fucking COWARD.
Because there shouldn't be any policy regarding abortion. It is a medical procedure. Government interest shouldn't be much more intrusive other than to ensure its' affordability. It is a decision for the woman and her doctor—period. Religion should have no say, because there are too many of them with differing beliefs of essentially, a lie anyway. #BansOffOurBodies
And they're going to try again.
Obli'cat'ory Cat Tax

item.title: Public Education Deserves Funding
item.description: I’m grateful to live in Canada where I truly believe we have one of the best education systems in the world. However, where I live has had many years of right-leaning governments that has led to chronic underfunding of our public schools. Our current government is extremely right-wing and in its most recent funding announcement to build not-even-close-to-enough-schools, for the first time, has decided to start directing public funding to build private schools. This just further serves to undermine public education.
item.dc:creator: notarightienow

item.title: Attention All Personnel: On this day in 1952, Colonel Sherman T. Potter was put in command of M*A*S*H 4077 @ 1600 hours. Please celebrate this military hero. That is all.
